title: aster altaicus var. millefolius
intro: Aster altaicus var. millefolius, also known as White Mugwort or Korean Mugwort, is a plant in the daisy family, characterized by its fragrant leaves and small white flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aster altaicus var. millefolium include relieving digestive issues, reducing menstrual cramps, and improving sleep quality. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
